title: Health Bar Indicator
description: Adds Health Bar to all the mobs around you!
body:
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e267c0777fb2c9e83065c46b891517d6513ecd8.png) Have you ever stared into a zombie’s eyes (or, well, at least in its direction) and thought, “How close am I to taking it down? With **Health Bar** Data Pack / Mod, you’ll finally get an answer! Now, every entity – from the friendly **villager** to the stubborn **creeper** – will show how much health they have left. ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff0248b100a10cf5c01e8bec3e047849d734b930_0.webp) ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5da0442fcc8f2d77453f4c79a2bfcb0c84b1c0fc.png) Visible health bar above entities' heads. - No more guessing: you’ll always **know their health.** - Compatible with **all** Minecraft **entities**. - The Bar will be longer or shorter, it depends on the max health the entity have. - Personalized bars: You can choose the color of the Health Bar of your enemy! Just type /function diesse:hb/config No more uncertain battles or hopeful strikes without knowing the impact. Every hit counts, and now you’ll know exactly how much it counts. # Website If you have any questions, need assistance, or simply want to share your thoughts or feedback, feel free to reach out. We're always here to help and would love to hear from you – whether you're looking for answers, suggestions, or just want to let us know how we're doing.
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a21d1c453796757f5e27ce9b94e648664755964_0.webp)![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb8b289a15c3eee79a8540f279e3486f6e7e22fc.png) ## Other links [![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1939f49bcb6e53e1f7c526c007eeb1be4a69aeb2.png)‎](https://it.fiverr.com/diesse2007) [![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/169f5456fb11650701a2af7890b911e62386388e_0.webp)‎](https://x.com/dskianto) [![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c38479243db42f491e3674a0ccda6de2c934b7f.png)‎](https://wanmine.net/)
